title: chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. polare
intro: Chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. polare is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the Arctic regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum arcticum subsp. polare include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
